subTitle: Shinnosuke Nohara, a five-year-old boy with a fascination for older women, commits frequent mischief around his friends and family.

title: Honey Bunny Ka Jholmaal
subTitle: Shinchan nohara is a little boy who seems to do everything he can to annoy his parents and teachers (and succeeds wildly), but only means the best. he just tries to have a good time.

subTitle: Shin-chan is taken to a music school by Misae so he can learn music. However, the teacher of the institution leaves Misae upset.

title: Paap-O-Meter
subTitle: When it begins to rain torrentially, Misae quickly moves the clothes to the first floor but forgets to close a tap which leads to flooding.

subTitle: When Misae makes the decision to throw away Shin-chan's toys, Shin-chan tries to hide all of them at Shinobu's house.

subTitle: Hiroshi takes the family on a fishing trip and his motion sickness makes him vomit. However, he later helps Shin-chan catch a large fish.
